scenario.name: register_auth
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field0] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field1]@[field0]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[field0]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[field0] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field1]@[field0]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[field0]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 [field2] Content-Length: 0
